description_long: This kiosk is a rectangular, box-like structure with a series of evenly spaced, deep vertical slats or grooves running along its top surface, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The sides are smooth and unadorned, with no visible windows, doors, or signage, emphasizing a clean and utilitarian design. The material appears to be a solid, light-colored substance, likely painted metal or composite, with a matte finish. The top slats may serve as ventilation or decorative elements, but do not appear to provide access or visibility into the interior. The overall form is robust and monolithic, suggesting durability and resistance to weather. There are no visible interactive components or architectural embellishments, reinforcing its functional, contemporary style.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with deep vertical slats on top and smooth, unadorned sides in a light color. The design is minimalist and robust, with no visible windows, doors, or signage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vertical slats on top and a smooth, featureless front panel.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a completely smooth, uninterrupted surface with no openings or details.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the slatted top and a plain back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view is identical to the first side, with a flat, featureless surface.
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with deep vertical slats, no overhangs or decorative features, likely metal or composite
